case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. FRANKLIN DELANO ROSS

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT FRANKLIN DELANO ROSS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $731.97 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ROSS, FRANKLIN DELANO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-25-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED MAY-08-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ROSS, FRANKLIN DELANO
